title: Fronded closeout: now under Lanternlit; support-only; no claims/staged files
body: Team-member closeout posted direct to Lanternlit as 3e7a4fcb. Current Fronded state: reports to Lanternlit Listening Dusk per owner topology change; Mistbound remains Commit Marshal; no active Fronded claims; git diff --staged empty; no source ownership; watcher/heartbeat active. Seaworthy tick #4 routes R2 fan-out to Mistbound, so Fronded is standing by for Lanternlit-directed narrow support only.
